title: Huan Dong
content:
Huan Dong is a member of the Huan family from the planet Thousand Illusion. He is described as a handsome man in his early thirties. Acting under Liu Mei’s orders, he is sent to handle a specific matter on the planet Ran Yun, expressing full confidence that he will not disappoint her.

His cultivation has reached the peak of the mid-stage Ascendant realm. He practices the Five Element Intent Art, specializing in the metal element.

Huan Dong displays arrogance and confidence upon descending onto Ran Yun. He releases his divine sense, infused with celestial spiritual energy, shocking the local cultivators. He confronts the Ran family’s ancestor and others, declaring that he is acting under the authority of the Huan family.

However, Huan Dong is ultimately captured by Wang Lin using the Seven Star Sword Formation. During his capture, he is interrogated about Liu Mei and the Huan family. Despite threatening that his death would provoke retaliation from the Huan family, led by Lady Huan Mei AKA Liu Mei, Wang Lin proceeds to use a Soul Search technique to probe his memories. Through this, he uncovers information about Huan Mei AKA Liu Mei and other secrets related to the Huan family.

In the end, Huan Dong is killed by Wang Lin, and his origin soul is captured and sealed.
Category:Characters
Category:Male
Category:Ascendant
Category:Deceased
